name: LEDGER Actuals Contract
description: Transitive hard producer dependency. BUDGET invokes the released public LEDGER actuals contract once and reuses that complete immutable snapshot for both canonical Budget Position calculation and the dated members returned to INSIGHTS. INSIGHTS validates cited LEDGER contract, snapshot, generation, category, and correction provenance but does not issue an independent ledger.actuals.query, consume a cursor, or access private LEDGER state.
